_source: Tunable — single source of truth for the level-rule thresholds the engine fires on. HRV/RHR/sleep cutoffs follow the HRV-monitoring and sleep-consensus literature (Plews/Buchheit; Walsh et al. 2021); workout ACWR bands follow Gabbett (2016), which is methodologically contested (Impellizzeri et al. 2020). Broadly ACSM-aligned, but ACSM is not the source of the specific numbers.
